arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea's stance on signing Matheus Cunha after Wolves star admits he wants to take 'the next step'
Enzo Maresca responds to cancelling Chelsea day off after first team thrashed by under-21s
arts.sum: Chelsea have a huge game against Tottenham coming up on Thursday but there has been some concern over three defeats in their last five league games - before the senior side lost 3-0 to the Under-21s

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed triple injury boost ahead of Spurs test
arts.sum: Chelsea have been handed a significant injury boost ahead of their match against Tottenham Hotspur, with manager Enzo Maresca confirming that Cole Palmer, Noni Madueke and Nicolas Jackson - the club's three leading scorers - are all in contention to feature on Thursday. Jackson, who has netted nine times in the league, has been out since early February after suffering a hamstring injury against West Ham United, while Madueke, on seven goals, has also been unavailable since that month.

arts.ttl: TEN memorable moments from Chelsea v Spurs
arts.sum: But Mauricio Pochettino ’s first reunion with Spurs, after he was appointed Chelsea head coach ahead of the 2023/24 season, was eventually overshadowed by the crazy game that unfolded, one of the most eventful in Premier League history. But Spurs had the final say when Harry Kane levelled six minutes into stoppage time to deny Chelsea a deserved win.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea host Tottenham in the Premier League on Thursday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Tottenham: Results of last 5 meetings ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: The results of the last five meetings between London rivals Chelsea and Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals how he reacted to his Chelsea stars after they suffered embarrassing defeat by the UNDER-21s in training match
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca says Chelsea's players received his message loud and clear after the Italian was so alarmed by the poor standard in training last week that he cancelled their day off.

arts.ttl: Something has to give – Ange Postecoglou wants solution to packed calendar
arts.sum: Tottenham are one of several clubs to have struggled with injuries this season after juggling multiple competitions.

arts.sum: Cuthbert's had a brilliant season for her country and has been recognised in style
